_note: LIVE: dvandva.baton.v3 — current write schema. v2 remains readable as a historical migration reference in baton-schema-v2.json.
_carry_fields_note: Option B delta re-verification (delta-reverification-2, 2026-07-12): seven ADDITIVE optional fields may be authored on a verification_matrix row or a subagent_track (all land in the untyped rest map — no new struct field, no new status). carried_from_checkpoint (int, agent-authored) is the mode switch: present claims a same-id carry, with the origin resolved by the unit's OWN id at that checkpoint — there is NO carried_from_id field. carry_reason (string, agent-authored) is the audit trail for the claim; blank or absent forces RE_RUN. covers_chunks (array of work_split chunk ids, agent-authored) is the CLAIMED SEED the engine expands into the transitive covered closure; free-text covers is never consulted for this. global (bool, agent-authored) is the explicit UNBOUNDED sentinel — global:true, or covers:["*"], or a non-derivable covers_chunks, all force RE_RUN, and any one of these signals alone is sufficient. covered_input_digest (string, ENGINE-stamped) is the closure's origin commit anchor (git rev-parse HEAD at stamp time); digest_algo (string, ENGINE-stamped) is fixed to git-covers-diff-v1; covered_paths (array, ENGINE-stamped) is the engine's own expansion of covers_chunks, never the agent's claim — carry is valid only when 'git diff --quiet <origin_commit> -- <covered_paths>' reports no change. ONLY a test_creation subagent_track is ever carry-eligible (RR-8): cross_review, deep_review, and risk-angle tracks, and every verification_matrix row, are unbounded judgements that always re-run in full. The terminal done-gate is UNCHANGED and never honors carry. A baton with none of these seven fields anywhere simply takes the existing fresh path, unchanged — see subagent_tracks_example / verification_matrix_example below for the shape, and rust/dvandva/src/lint/schema_parity.rs for the backward-compat pin.

profile_decision.reason: Default development profile for new v3 development scaffolds when no hard-risk trigger selects full and no fast allowlist evidence selects fast.

subagent_tracks_example.rationale: Illustrates a validly CARRIED test_creation track (Option B, RR-8): only a mechanical test_creation subagent_track may ever carry. covers_chunks is the agent-authored seed the engine expands into the transitive covered closure; covered_input_digest/digest_algo/covered_paths are then ENGINE-stamped, never agent-authored. There is no carried_from_id field — the origin is the candidate's OWN id at carried_from_checkpoint (same-id carry).
subagent_tracks_example.carry_reason: covers_chunks closure is disjoint from this fix's diff; origin at checkpoint 12 (earlier than the current checkpoint) was a real, on-cycle, passing execution.
subagent_tracks_example._field_guard_note: Field-to-guard map against test_creation_to_cross_review_ok (write.rs) and decide() (reverify.rs), neither edited by this fix. phase=='test_creation' + track=='test-creation' + owner=='dvandva-test-creator' + status=='completed' are the track's shape predicate; result=='passed' feeds good_result(); non-empty outputs/evidence_refs feed the evidence-floor count checks. carried_from_checkpoint present is decide()'s carry-claim entry guard (absent ⇒ ReRun); covers_chunks is guard (a)'s engine-derivable closure seed; global:false and no covers:['*'] clear guard (b)'s unbounded/terminal check; carry_reason non-blank satisfies guard (f). covered_input_digest/digest_algo/covered_paths are the ENGINE-stamped triple guard (e) byte-compares against the origin snapshot's stored triple (SP-1 anti-substitution) and anchors the git-diff-over-closure check — on a real track these three are never agent-authored.

verification_matrix_example.expected: 100% changed-line coverage for newly created behavior.
verification_matrix_example.carry_reason: NEVER HONORED — see _carry_note. This row is NOT carry-eligible; the field is shown only to document that it is structurally accepted (untyped rest map) while being ignored by every gate.
verification_matrix_example._carry_note: Option B (RR-8): the same seven carry fields are structurally LEGAL on a verification_matrix row exactly as shown here (schema/parsing accepts them into the untyped rest map), but NO gate ever reads or honors them on a row — this example is documentation of accepted shape only, never a claim that this row is carry-eligible. Carry is honored ONLY at the single test_creation_to_cross_review_ok gate, and only for a subagent_track whose track=='test-creation' (see subagent_tracks_example). Every verification_matrix row always re-verifies in full via stale_verification_matrix_row at done, regardless of any carry claim present on the row.

summary: Initial v3 run-scoped baton seed. The vadi skill fills run_id, original_ask, research_ref, and the run_workflow declaration before the first write.
next_action: vadi: draft clarifying questions, then hand off to the human for clarifying_questions_answer.
